headline: 69 Wildfire Events Across 33 Regions (2022–2026)
summary: This dataset documents 69 wildfire events from 2022-09-21 to 2026-02-10 across 33 distinct regions. 1 critical (red) and 3 elevated (orange) alerts were recorded. Top affected regions: Central African Republic, Sudan, Argentina.
keyInsights: Central African Republic leads with 19 events (27.5% of total), followed by Sudan (13) and Argentina (2).
1 critical-level events identified, the most severe being Red notification for tropical cyclone GEZANI-26. Population affected by Category.
3 elevated (orange) alert events requiring close monitoring across multiple regions.
94.2% of events are advisory (green) level, but the 4 elevated-or-higher events represent significant cumulative risk.
